prompt: Write a 300-word public roadmap policy + content draft for openpatent.ai. Cover: (1) the 4 status columns — Shipped, In Progress (with % complete), Planned (with target quarter), Considering (with public-vote count), (2) the 3 visibility layers — Public (everyone sees the title + status), Customer (paying customers see the linked Jira epic + ETA), Sovereign (the $4,999 tier sees the BFT council ethics review notes), (3) the 12 entries to publish at launch — 4 Shipped (6-layer disclosure stack, verify.openpatent.ai public page, BFT council public testnet, MCP server 23+10 tools), 4 In Progress (multi-region replication at 60%, FedRAMP Moderate at 30%, IP-boutique white-label at 45%, BFT slashing evidence chain at 20%), 2 Planned (Q2 2027 model-weights hash format, Q2 2027 dataset-CID anchoring), 2 Considering (HuggingFace plugin — 1,840 votes, arXiv pre-print hook — 920 votes), (4) the 3 update cadences — Shipped moves to the column when deployed, In Progress updated weekly, vote counts reset monthly, (5) the 1 anti-pattern rule — never put a regulatory-dependent feature in 'Planned' without an asterisk, (6) the 1 community-input mechanism — thumbs-up on Considering entries, top 3 per quarter advance to Planned. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {columns:[4 strings], visibility_layers:[3 strings], entries:[{title:string, status:string, progress_pct:int, target_quarter:string, visibility:string, votes:int}], cadences:[3 strings], anti_pattern_rule:string, community_input:string}.
